case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY FREEDOM FIRST BAIL BONDS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY FREEDOM FIRST BAIL BONDS $272.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $352.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
